test_name: 077. Rented Properties Information About a House

content.cn_text: 测试4。这是雅思听力测试。你将听到几段不同的录音。
content.en_text: Test 4. This is the IELTS listening test. You will hear a number of different recordings

content.cn_text: 你需要根据所听内容回答问题。你会有时间
content.en_text: and you will have to answer questions on what you hear. There will be time for you to

content.cn_text: 阅读说明和题目，也会有机会检查答案。所有
content.en_text: read the instructions and questions and you will have a chance to check your work. All

content.cn_text: 录音只播放一遍。考试分为四个部分。考试结束时，
content.en_text: the recordings will be played once only. The test is in four parts. At the end of the

content.cn_text: 你将有十分钟时间把答案誊写到答题卡上。现在请翻到
content.en_text: test you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to the answer sheet. Now turn

content.cn_text: 第一部分。
content.en_text: to Part 1.

content.cn_text: 第一部分。你将听到一名学生打电话给房东租房。首先，你有
content.en_text: Part 1. You will hear a student calling a landlord to rent a house. First, you have

content.cn_text: 一些时间浏览第1至第6题。
content.en_text: some time to look at questions 1 to 6.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第1至第6题。
content.en_text: Now, listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 6.

content.cn_text: Landlord：你好。 Student：哦，你好。我想咨询一下你要出租的那套房子。它还
content.en_text: Landlord: Hello. Student: Oh, hello. I wanted to inquire about the house you're going to let out. Is it still

content.cn_text: 可以租吗？ Landlord：可以。请问你是在哪里看到的？是在广告上吗？ Student：是的，是在广告上。
content.en_text: available? Landlord: Yes. May I ask where you heard about it? Was it in an advert? Student: Right. It was.

content.cn_text: Landlord：好的。你想了解什么？ Student：嗯，我打算和两个朋友合租这套房子。我们
content.en_text: Landlord: Okay. What do you want to know? Student: Well, I'm going to share the house with two friends. We've

content.cn_text: 一直住在校园里，但我们快毕业了，所以需要尽快找一套房子。
content.en_text: been staying on campus, but we're going to graduate, so we need to find a house as soon

content.cn_text: 总之，你能告诉我确切什么时候可以搬进去吗？
content.en_text: as possible. Anyway, could you tell me the exact date when you can move in?

content.cn_text: Landlord：我现在租客的合同下周5月3日到期，我需要一天时间打扫
content.en_text: Landlord: Well, the contract with my current tenant is due next week on May 3rd, and I need a day to clean

content.cn_text: 并检查房子里的东西。所以我认为房子会在5月5日准备好。
content.en_text: and check the things in the house. So, I think the house will be ready on the 5th of May.

content.cn_text: 可以吗？ Student：可以，没问题。我们最关心的是
content.en_text: Is that okay? Student: Yes, that will be fine. And what we're most concerned about is the

content.cn_text: 租金。我们希望每个人每月大约500美元，但如果必须的话可以到
content.en_text: rent. We'd like something around $500 a month for each of us, but we could go up to

content.cn_text: 600美元，但不能超过这个数。 Landlord：你们很幸运。租金总共是1700美元。
content.en_text: $600 if we have to, but we can't go beyond that. Landlord: You are lucky. The rent will be $1,700

content.cn_text: 在你们预算范围内。你们需要每月付给我，可以现金或信用卡支付。
content.en_text: in total, which is within your budget. You'll need to pay monthly to me by cash or credit

content.cn_text: 我都可以。在搬入前，你们还需要付给我1500美元押金。
content.en_text: card. I don't mind. And you'll have to pay me $1,500 as a deposit before you move in.

content.cn_text: 押金是为了防止你们损坏东西。 Student：好的，这很合理。
content.en_text: The deposit is as insurance in case you break something. Student: Okay, that's reasonable.

content.cn_text: Landlord：哦，我差点忘了。还有一件重要的事，你们需要提供信用审查。
content.en_text: Landlord: Oh, I nearly forgot. One important thing is that you'll be required to provide a credit check

content.cn_text: 用来保证你们每月有能力支付租金。这会收取15美元。 Student：没问题。
content.en_text: to guarantee your ability to pay the rent every month. This will charge you $15. Student: No problem.

content.cn_text: 设施怎么样？ Landlord：首先，有三间卧室，配有
content.en_text: How about the facilities? Landlord: First, there are three bedrooms combined

content.cn_text: 两个浴室。然后，有一个共用厨房，几个月前刚翻新过。
content.en_text: with two bathrooms. Then, there is a shared kitchen, which was refurbished several months

content.cn_text: 顺便问一下，你们自己做饭吗？ Student：是的，我们喜欢做饭。我们需要自己买
content.en_text: ago. By the way, do you cook yourselves? Student: Yeah, we like cooking. Do we have to buy our own

content.cn_text: 炉具吗？ Landlord：基本的烹饪设施都有，
content.en_text: cookers? Landlord: Basic facilities for cooking are available,

content.cn_text: 但如果你们想要洗碗机，抱歉，这个需要之后再加。
content.en_text: but if you want a dishwasher, I'm sorry it needs to be added later.

content.cn_text: Student：我觉得基本设施对我们来说够了。有没有地方停车？因为我的一个朋友有
content.en_text: Student: I think the basic facilities are enough for us. Is there any place we can park as one of my friends has

content.cn_text: 私家车。 Landlord：有，有一个车库，不仅可以提供
content.en_text: a private car? Landlord: Yes, there is a garage which not only provides

content.cn_text: 停车空间，还有一个特别区域，你们可以在那里做一些工作。那里
content.en_text: space for your car but also has a special section where you can do some of your work. It's

content.cn_text: 很安静，方便集中注意力。 Student：听起来很特别。
content.en_text: very quiet for you to concentrate. Student: It sounds so special.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间浏览第7至第10题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 7 to 10.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第7至第10题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 7 to 10.

content.cn_text: Landlord：还有一些其他设施我需要告诉你。房子前面有一个花园，
content.en_text: Landlord: There are some other utilities I have to tell you. There is a garden in front of the house

content.cn_text: 里面有一些有趣的植物和漂亮的花。 Student：我们需要照看
content.en_text: in which you will find some interesting plants and beautiful flowers. Student: Do we have to take

content.cn_text: 这些植物和花吗？ Landlord：这个你们不用担心。会有
content.en_text: care of these plants and flowers? Landlord: Well, you don't have to worry about that. There will

content.cn_text: 专业园丁定期做花园景观维护，但你们确实需要
content.en_text: be a professional gardener to do the landscaping in the garden regularly, but you do need

content.cn_text: 每周帮忙浇一次草地。这对你们来说有问题吗？ Student：当然没有。我们愿意
content.en_text: to help water the grass once a week. Is it a problem for you? Student: Of course not. We'd like

content.cn_text: 做这件事。 Landlord：还有一件事，在这个地区，每户都会安排一名清洁工，
content.en_text: to do that. Landlord: Another thing is in this district every household is arranged with a cleaner

content.cn_text: 负责清理垃圾和回收，但这项服务会收取你们
content.en_text: responsible for cleaning up the rubbish and recycling, but this service will cost you

content.cn_text: 每月15美元。 Student：我们还需要支付哪些账单？ Landlord：电费、水费
content.en_text: 15 dollars every month. Student: What other bills do we have to pay? Landlord: Bills for electricity, water

content.cn_text: 和燃气费也需要你们自己承担。 Student：好的，还有一个问题。房子里有空调吗？
content.en_text: and gas will also be covered by yourselves. Student: Okay, one more question. Is air conditioning

content.cn_text: Landlord：如果你指的是中央空调，恐怕目前没有。
content.en_text: available in the house? Landlord: If you mean central air conditioning, I'm afraid there isn't

content.cn_text: 但每个房间都有一个安装在窗户上的窗式空调机。
content.en_text: the moment, but each room has a window conditioning unit which is installed on the window.

content.cn_text: Student：那也可以。总之，我觉得这是个适合居住的地方。我们可以去看看
content.en_text: Student: That will be fine. Anyway, I think it's a good place to live in. Can we go and see the

content.cn_text: 房子吗？ Landlord：当然可以。可以告诉我你的姓名和电话号码吗？ Student：可以，我叫 Sam Dressler。
content.en_text: house please? Landlord: Yes, of course. May I have your name and phone number? Student: Yes, I'm Sam Dressler.

content.cn_text: 拼写是 S-A-M, D-R-E-double S-L-E-R。 Landlord：好的，Sam Dressler，我记下了。
content.en_text: That's S-A-M, D-R-E,-double S-L-E-R. Landlord: Okay, Sam Dressler, I've got that down.

content.cn_text: Student：我的电话号码是 67534571。非常感谢。我和我的
content.en_text: Student: And my phone number is 67534571. Thank you very much. I'll contact you after discussing it with my

content.cn_text: 两个朋友商量后会联系你。 Landlord：没问题。再见。 Student：再见。
content.en_text: two friends. Landlord: No problem. Bye. Student: Bye.

content.cn_text: 第一部分到此结束。你现在有一分钟时间
content.en_text: That is the end of Part 1. You now have one minute

content.cn_text: 检查第一部分的答案。
content.en_text: to check your answers to Part 1.

groups.desc:
Complete the table below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Question 1–10

items.title: Available date: 1. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 Available date，原文说 the house will be ready on the 5th of May，所以答案是 May 5th。May 3rd 是当前租客合同到期日，不是可入住日期。

items.title: Rent: $ 2. __________ per month
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Rent 每月多少钱，原文说 the rent will be $1,700 in total，所以答案是 1700。$500 和 $600 是学生自己的预算范围。
答案解析：第3题空格后是 $15，原文说 This will charge you $15，this 指前面的 credit check，所以答案是 credit check。$1500 是 deposit，不是这道题。

items.title: A remodeled 4. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 A remodeled ______，原文说 shared kitchen, which was refurbished several months ago，所以答案是 kitchen。refurbished 对应 remodeled。

items.title: No 5. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 No ______，原文说 dishwasher needs to be added later，说明现在没有 dishwasher，所以答案是 dishwasher。

items.title: A 6. __________ with a work area
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 A ______ with a work area，原文说 there is a garage，里面还有可以工作的区域，所以答案是 garage。

items.title: The landlord will provide landscaping service, but the tenants must 7. __________ the grass
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 tenants must ______ the grass，原文说 help water the grass once a week，所以答案是 water。gardener 是负责 landscaping 的人，不是租客要做的事。

items.title: The tenants should pay $15 for trashing and 8. __________ service
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 trashing and ______ service，原文说 cleaning up the rubbish and recycling，所以答案是 recycling。15 dollars 是这项服务的费用。

items.title: There is no central air conditioning, but there is a 9. __________ conditioning unit
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 there is a ______ conditioning unit，原文说 a window conditioning unit，所以答案是 window。central air conditioning 是没有的设施。

items.title: Name of landlord: Sam 10. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 Name of landlord: Sam ______，原文拼写为 S-A-M-D-R-E-double S-L-E-R，所以答案是 Dressler。
